content.en:
The years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed has finally solidified to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, and the entire Eternal Dao Seed has completely completed the solidification, and at this time, he can impact the Eternal Dao Realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian announced a retreat and shocked the Eternal Realm God Realm.

From the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, the main thing is the transformation of the body, the transformation of strength, as for the Eternal Dao Seed, there is actually no transformation.

At this time.

Ye Tian prepared a large amount of resources and refined them with the Eternal Dao Seed, turning them into incomparably pure energy that poured into his whole body, and then impacted the shackles in the underworld.

Not much.

Click!

The shackles in the underworld were shattered, and the body began to transform, transforming from the Eternal Dao Body to the Eternal Realm God Body, and the power in the body was also transforming, turning into a higher-level power, and the strength was undergoing a transformation that was difficult to "five-two-three" imagined.

I don't know how long it has been, but the resources on Ye Tian's body have been consumed countless times, and only then have he completed his transformation and broken through to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

......

"The strength is far beyond before, and now, even if I don't use the Eternal Demon Pillar, I can easily kill an Eternal Realm God Realm like the Xuanze Realm God!" Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

The Eternal Pillar appeared in his hand, and he continued to refine it.

In the past, although he could control the Eternal Demon Pillar, he actually did not really refine it thoroughly.

Now, his refining speed far surpassed that of the past.

If he completely controls the Eternal Pillar, his strength will be even stronger.

In addition to thoroughly refining the Eternal Demon Pillar, he also had to cultivate the Eternal Realm God Realm.

The cultivation of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm is naturally different from the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm, the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm only needs to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, while the cultivation of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm is to continue to improve the Eternal Dao Seed first, and then to nurture the Eternal Dao Seed Realm Spirit.

After the Eternal Dao seed is solidified, it is not that it cannot continue to improve, but it is difficult to improve, and the difficulty is much greater than before.

And after breaking through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed limit was gone, and he could continue to grow the Eternal Dao Seed.

"Try the Eternal Demon Pillar's effect on the Eternal Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed began to use the Eternal Demon Pillar to refine it.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Eternal Demon Pillar continues to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, but the Eternal Demon Pillar is still trying to influence the solidified Eternal Dao Seed.

"The influence of the Eternal Demon Pillar is terrifying, that is, I have a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, otherwise the solidified Eternal Dao Seed of the other Eternal Realm God Realms will still not be able to bear it, and there is still a risk of being reversed into a Demon Seed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian tried the effect of treasures such as evil vines, although he could still improve his eternal Dao species, but the effect was already very poor.

Of course.

If it was other Eternal Realm God Realms, I was afraid that he still wanted to obtain a treasure like the Evil Vine, and Ye Tiancai would not look down on it.

"In the future, I will use the Eternal Demon Pillar to refine the Eternal Dao Seed. "

Ye Tian decided.

......

Imaginary domain.

The Eternal Spirit Tree is here.

Ye Tian continued to cultivate the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree, and now the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree has been cultivated into a giant tree by Ye Tian, but it is still a long way from giving birth to the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and it will take a long time before there is hope of giving birth to an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit.

After breaking through to the Eternal Realm Deity, he continued to use the power of the Eternal Dao Seed to water the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree, the effect would be better, and there was a high probability that the cultivation time would be reduced.

"There should be no problem with cultivating the Eternal Dao Spirit Fruit, the next thing is to continue to grow the Eternal Dao Seed, and when the Eternal Dao Seed is raised to the limit and there is no way to improve, try to cultivate the Eternal Dao Seed Realm Spirit. I just happened to obtain the Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm Spirit Inheritance, and I can cultivate the Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm Spirit. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He plans to cultivate the Endless Kingdom Alliance into a super-large Eternal Kingdom Alliance, and grow the number of Eternal Kingdoms to a thousand.

Over the years, he had collected a lot of eternal decrees, so it wasn't too difficult.

It's just that he often has to take some eternal decrees to break through the abyss of the demon seed, so that the demon seed can't be attracted to it.

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian began to move the entrance of the Void Domain, he wanted to move the entrance of the Void Domain to the side of the Endless Realm Alliance, as for the two Eternal Realms on the side of the Myriad Gods Kingdom Alliance, he was ready to give up.

Rumble!!!!

Under Ye Tian's power, the entrance of the Void Domain was moved little by little, and even the entire Void Domain was moved.

If you didn't have the power of the Eternal Realm God Realm, you wouldn't be able to do this........

The Void Realm is not a floating realm, but a fixed realm, but if it is strong, it can still move a realm like the Void Domain.

Gradually, the Void was moved to the Endless Realm Alliance, and the entrance was also placed in the Eternal Realm, the most central part of the Endless Realm Alliance, and from now on, the passage between the Endless Realm Alliance and the Void Realm was completely opened.

Any human can freely enter and leave the two places, and those who have stayed in the Endless Realm Alliance and have not gone back can also go back to have a look.

Soon.

This news was announced, and countless humans were immediately excited.

And the human beings in the Void Realm were also extremely excited, and the human powerhouses whose strength had reached the Mythical Dao Realm went to the Human Realm one after another.

Of course, the non-human forces in the Void Realm cannot enter the Endless Realm Alliance.

......

Imaginary domain.

Those patriarchs of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance were still cultivating in the Mythical Realm at this time, and the first Patriarch had re-cultivated to the Eternal Dao Realm, but it was a crippled Eternal Dao Realm, and its strength was not as good as the real Eternal Dao Realm.

Therefore, when the human powerhouses of the Endless Kingdom Alliance returned, they were directly dumbfounded.

Rumble!!!!!

At the entrance of the passage, a venerable human race powerhouse descended, attracting this group of elders.

"That's the Eternal Dao Realm!!!!"

The Tenth Patriarch was shocked. 2.0 is fast.

One after another of the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm came out.

In a short period of time, the dense Eternal Dao Realm returned to the Void Realm, and even the First Elder was shocked.

"How is this possible, all of them are Eternal Dao Realm, and some of the Eternal Dao Realm aura is even more terrifying than the Qingyuan Lord!!!!" The First Elder was dumbfounded.

He knew that after the Terran broke out of the Void Domain, they entered the Eternal Realm and became very powerful, after all, even the Terrans in the Void Realm had cultivated many Mythical Dao Realm and Eternal Dao powerhouses, which were far from being comparable to other forces.

However, it is not so exaggerated!

In addition to these Eternal Dao powerhouses, there are countless Eternal Dao powerhouses who have come back to take a look, they have only just gone to the Eternal Realm, and they have become Eternal Dao powerhouses when they come back, which makes countless human beings in the Void Realm envious.
